title: Substrate event (behaviour-note): Director tick #16 — Cycle #9 db4d8b3a (PDR-076 v2); pattern v2 ship-verdict (Ferny self-attest); 11 cumulative commits 58 min; owner-coherence 4/5 components ready
body:
